name: usps-click-n-ship-browser-automation
description: Browser automation for USPS Click-N-Ship — bulk create shipping labels, schedule pickups, track packages, manage USPS accounts, and automate postage purchasing without undocumented USPS Web Tools limitations.

scripts.test: node -e "require('./src/auth'); require('./src/actions'); require('./src/utils'); console.log('✓ All modules load correctly')"
